'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=J_D0Qv_b4wj.l5J.nynM8Nq4cZ5CkkYHo9qdZtAndPM-1773185743-1.0.1.1-VtsxfMr5ZiP8_ZJcp73a4gIKtDQCN6S8TOxXRDqHeRU"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
